location: Seventh-day Adventist Youth • All Over Zambia

weeklyPrograms.title: Tuesday Prayer & Fellowship
weeklyPrograms.description: Powerful intercessory prayer meeting for all youth across Zambia

weeklyPrograms.title: Thursday Bible Study
weeklyPrograms.description: Deep study of the Bible and Spirit of Prophecy

thisWeekMessage.title: Faith That Works
thisWeekMessage.summary: This week we explored how genuine faith must be accompanied by works. As SDA Youth, we are called to live out our beliefs in these last days.

encouragementQuotes.text: I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
Remember the Sabbath day, to keep it holy.
Let your light so shine before men, that they may see your good works.
Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid.
The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.
